description: Replace Nango-based Slack integration with native implementation using browser session tokens (xoxc- + d cookie). Matches iMessage/LinkedIn stealth pattern.

decisions.tokenStorage: LOCAL ONLY - macOS Keychain via Electron safeStorage
decisions.contactSync: Conversation-based only - no bulk workspace member import
decisions.architecture: Electron is sync hub (same as iMessage/LinkedIn)

tasks.description: Create Slack login webview - apps/electron/src/main/auth/slack-login.ts with Electron BrowserWindow for Slack login
steps: Implement BrowserWindow that opens Slack workspace login
Add detection for successful login via localStorage token
Extract d cookie from browser session
Run pnpm typecheck in apps/electron to verify

tasks.description: Implement local credential storage using Electron safeStorage API
steps: Implement saveSlackCredentials() with encryption via safeStorage
Implement getSlackCredentials() to retrieve and decrypt
Implement clearSlackCredentials() to remove from storage
Run pnpm typecheck in apps/electron to verify

tasks.description: Add Slack connection status to Convex integrations table (metadata only, no tokens)
steps: Ensure NO token or cookie is stored in cloud
Run pnpm typecheck in packages/convex to verify
Create packages/integrations/src/slack/types.ts with Slack API types
Implement testAuth(), listConversations(), getHistory(), getReplies(), postMessage(), getUserInfo()
Run pnpm typecheck in packages/integrations to verify

tasks.description: Add RTM WebSocket implementation to SlackClient
steps: Add event handlers for message, reaction, typing events
Implement start() that initiates sync with RTM connection
Implement runSync() to fetch conversations and messages
Add progress callbacks matching LinkedInSyncProgress pattern
Add auth error handling with re-login prompt

tasks.description: Update Convex sync/slack.ts for conversation-based sync
steps: Create contacts from DM participants during conversation sync
Update lastMessageAt and unreadCount on conversations

tasks.description: Update message sync for isFromMe detection
steps: Update syncSlackMessagesInternal to compare message sender vs stored userId
Add contact enrichment via getUserInfo API call
Implement email matching for existing contacts

tasks.description: Add Slack to message queue processor
steps: Support thread replies via threadTs parameter
Add error handling and retry logic

tasks.description: Update web API send route to use Electron relay
steps: Route messages to Convex messageQueue for Electron pickup
Ensure status updates flow back to web

tasks.description: Update settings page for Slack connection flow
steps: Add 'Connect Slack' button when not connected
Trigger Electron webview login on click
Show connected status with team name
Add disconnect option that clears local credentials
Update packages/integrations/src/nango/index.ts to remove Slack exports
Verify no Nango Slack references remain
Add tests for API methods with mocked responses
Add tests for RTM connection logic
Confirm contacts created from conversations only
